slide0.title: We invest in metal. Not in marketing.
slide0.body: 100% of our financial assets are directed towards R&D, instrumental control and VELNOX product quality. The architecture of this website was entirely generated by artificial intelligence under our strict specification. Nothing superfluous. Pure efficiency only.

slide1.title: Cassette seals for agricultural machinery.
slide1.body: Maximum protection from abrasive dust and moisture. Multi-layer labyrinth sealing in the hub body preserves assembly life even under extreme field conditions.
slide1.spec: LEFG series — maintenance-free units for field conditions

slide2.title: Optimized geometry for extreme loads.
slide2.body: High-strength steel, precise geometry and engineered race surfaces — for withstanding radial and axial loads in construction and mining equipment.
slide2.spec: Load class: Cₙₙₙ up to 148 kN

slide3.title: Flange modification strictly to your specification.
slide3.body: From flange configuration to multi-stage cassette sealing — full R&D cycle: audit, CAD model, production, bench testing.
slide3.spec: Lead time: from 21 days with prototype

process.title: More Than a Catalogue. R&D for Your Specification.
process.desc: VELNOX doesn't just supply standard bearings. Our engineering team develops modified assemblies that solve the chronic problems of your machinery.

analyze.title: Specification Analysis & Assembly Audit
analyze.text: In-depth study of operating conditions, loads, environmental aggressiveness, and root cause of standard product failures.

design.title: Engineering Design & 3D Modelling
design.text: Development of the modified design: flange, sealing, materials. Full CAD model and service life calculation.

produce.title: Production & Bench Testing
produce.text: Series production with incoming steel inspection, bench testing and instrumental geometry measurement.

stats.title: Field Tested. Built for Heavy Soils.
stats.desc: Each batch of VELNOX hubs undergoes bench tests simulating the harshest agricultural machinery operating conditions. We guarantee perfect dimensional accuracy and absolute bearing protection against abrasives.

compatibility.title: Geometric Compatibility
compatibility.desc: Exact match with OEM manufacturer mounting points (Plug & Play installation).

resource.title: Machine Hours Resource
resource.desc: Uninterrupted operation in the field without the need for relubrication or unit disassembly.

sealings.title: Leaking & Dust
sealings.desc: Multi-layer cassette sealing system guarantees 100% tightness in mud and water.

cta.title: Find Your Solution Now.

oem_optimization.desc: We don’t just supply bearings—we offer complete engineering assemblies that fully integrate into your machinery.

hero.title: VELNOX Engineering: We design service life, not just parts.
hero.lead: VELNOX is an engineering brand of bearings and assemblies for critical applications in agricultural and industrial machinery. The brand belongs to Tech Solution sp. z o.o. and is focused on OEM manufacturers, engineering/design departments and professional distributors.

stats.title: Advantages by the Numbers
stats.s1_label: years of practical experience in agro and industrial sectors
stats.s2_label: clients among OEM manufacturers and engineering departments
stats.s3_label: tolerance parameter repeatability in serial batches
stats.s4_label: unique HUB, KIT solutions and special bearing SKUs

philosophy.title: Engineering Philosophy & OEM Focus
philosophy.p1_text: We work from the technical specification of the assembly: load, speed, service life, environment (dust/moisture/abrasive), fits, and maintenance requirements. The VELNOX solution is not a “universal bearing”, but a design for a specific operating mode.
philosophy.p2_text: For OEM, parameter repeatability and batch-to-batch stability are critical. VELNOX builds a product for serial application: control of materials, geometry and functional parameters, so that the same quality logic works in production.

custom.title: Engineering Customization of Assemblies
custom.text: We adapt the product to the client's task, including: sealing systems (dust/moisture/abrasive, different types of protection), type and volume of lubricant for the operating mode, materials and coatings for corrosive conditions, structural elements and fits for assembly and mounting.
custom.goal: Goal — predictable service life and minimized machinery downtime.

quality.title: Quality Approach
quality.text: VELNOX quality is a controlled outcome based on:
quality.list_item_3: verification of functional characteristics of the finished product.

audience.title: Our Target Audience
audience.desc: VELNOX is focused exclusively on technically demanding clients for whom assembly reliability is a direct production necessity.
audience.s1_desc: We ensure parameter stability for assembly lines. Batch-to-batch repeatability is our key standard.
audience.s2_desc: We provide precise calculations and 3D models for design. We work from your Technical Specification.
audience.s3_desc: We offer a reliable engineering alternative to European brands with verified characteristics.
audience.s4_desc: OEM manufacturers of trailed agricultural machinery and agricultural enterprises.

principles.title: OEM Approach
principles.card1_quote: VELNOX solutions are a design for a specific operating mode.
principles.card1_text: We work from the assembly technical specification.
principles.card2_text: For OEM, parameter repeatability and batch-to-batch stability are critical.

hero.title: VELNOX Bearing Units. Uncompromising Reliability for Serial Production.
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive engineering solutions designed for extreme radial and axial loads. From standard housing units to custom OEM projects.

block1.title: Why OEM Manufacturers Choose VELNOX Units?
block1.card1_desc: VELNOX bearing units are engineered to operate in severe field conditions: dust, moisture, abrasives and shock loads. The sealing and protective element design minimizes contamination entry into the rolling zone and ensures stable operation throughout the service life.
block1.card2_desc: For OEM production, tolerance repeatability is critical. VELNOX ensures stable geometry, mounting dimensions and functional parameters from batch to batch, guaranteeing predictable equipment performance in series production.
block1.card3_desc: VELNOX offers adaptation of bearing units to manufacturer requirements. Housing geometry, bearing parameters, sealing system and other elements can be modified according to operational conditions.

block2.title: Technical Specifications & Unit Parameters
block2.intro: The VELNOX technical guide is created for fast work by designers and purchasers. Below are summary parameter tables for exact unit selection for your tasks.

table1.title: Table 1: Dimensional Specifications and Mountings
table1.desc: This table is critical for engineers integrating the unit into a 3D equipment model.
table1.col_width: Total Housing Width (A, A1, A2, mm)

table2.title: Table 2: Performance & Load Ratings
table2.desc: This table is required for calculating service life and safety margin.

sealing_visual.title: Table: VELNOX Sealing Systems
sealing_visual.desc: Here we visualize and explain the types of protection, as this is the main advantage for the agricultural sector.
sealing_visual.2rs: Basic contact seal for neutral conditions.
sealing_visual.2s: Single-lip seal with labyrinth. High protection from coarse particles.
sealing_visual.tseal: Triple-lip seal for maximum protection against dust and moisture.
sealing_visual.dirtblock: Extreme protection for heavy disc harrows. Semi-metal-semi-rubber with a forged cover plate.

table3.title: Table 3: Cross-References & Installations
table3.desc: Critical for distributors looking for a replacement to existing units.

table5.title: Table 5: Extended Bearing Data
table5.desc: Additional bearing specifications and load ratings

sealing_info.title: TRIPLE-LIP + DOUBLE-LIP SEALING SYSTEM
sealing_info.p1: VELNOX bearing units are equipped with a combined sealing system featuring a triple-lip seal and an additional double-lip seal on both sides of the bearing.
sealing_info.p2: The triple-lip seal provides primary protection against dust, dirt and moisture, while the double-lip seal acts as a secondary barrier, limiting contaminant penetration under severe operating conditions.
sealing_info.p3: The use of reinforced sealing systems on both sides of the bearing allows VELNOX units to operate reliably across a wider range of applications and environmental conditions, particularly in agriculture.

block3.title: Ready for Integration into Your Project
block3.text: Download exact CAD models of units in the required format or contact our engineers to select a custom sealing system for your operating environment.

packer_roller.title: Packer Roller
packer_roller.content:
Packer rollers operate under continuous contact with soil, moisture and abrasive particles, resulting in constant radial loads and a highly contaminated working environment. Bearing units used in packer rollers must therefore ensure reliable operation under slow rotational speeds, high static loads and frequent shock impacts.

VELNOX bearing solutions for packer rollers are designed with reinforced housings, enhanced sealing systems and optimized internal clearances to withstand heavy loads and aggressive operating conditions. Special attention is given to contamination protection and long service life with minimal maintenance requirements.

These characteristics make VELNOX bearings a reliable solution for packer rollers used in modern agricultural machinery, ensuring stable performance and reduced downtime throughout the working season.

hero.title: VELNOX Bearing Hubs
hero.subtitle: Engineered units for intensive operation in aggressive environments
hero.desc: VELNOX hubs are engineered for direct replacement of original hub nodes from leading European and American agricultural machinery manufacturers. The primary focus is on multi-level sealing systems and stable operation under high axial loads.

block1.title: Why OEM Manufacturers Choose VELNOX Hubs?
block1.card1_desc: Hubs designed to operate in extreme dust and moisture conditions. Multi-level cassette sealing prevents soil moisture and abrasives from entering the unit.
block1.card2_desc: 100% geometric analogs of original HORSCH, Köckerling, Bednar, Vaderstad hubs. Direct installation without structural changes to machinery.
block1.card3_desc: Maintenance-free units with minimal play. Guaranteed service life of 2000+ hours in the field without lubrication or disassembly.

block2.title: Technical Specifications & Hub Parameters
block2.intro: VELNOX technical guide for quick OEM engineer reference. Tables contain complete parameters for hub selection for specific applications.

app1.title: Hubs for Disc Harrows and Heavy Cultivators
app1.desc: Unit designed for operation in extreme dust and moisture conditions. Used in soil preparation aggregates where each disc requires independent rotation under load.
app1.applications: Deep looseners, heavy disc harrows, combined aggregates
app1.oem_focus: Full compatibility with HORSCH equipment (Joker, Focus, Terrano series)

app2.title: Hubs for Cutting Nodes with Independent Suspension
app2.desc: Maintenance-free bearing units providing precise blade angle of attack. Design includes built-in cassette sealing eliminating lubrication needs throughout service life.
app2.oem_focus: Replacement hubs for Bednar, Köckerling, Gaspardo, Kuhn, Lemken

app3.title: Hubs for High-Speed Seeders and Press Wheels
app3.desc: High-precision rotation units. Minimal play ensures stable seeding depth even at high operating speeds.
app3.applications: Seeding complexes, grain and vegetable seeder sections
app3.oem_focus: Optimized for Vaderstad (Rapid series), Agrisem equipment

block3.title: Ready for Integration
block3.text: VELNOX hubs are a complete OEM solution requiring no changes to design documentation. All parameters are calculated and tested for real field conditions.

hero.title: VELNOX Agro Bearings. Series 1726.
hero.subtitle: Special series bearings for agricultural machinery. Direct OEM replacement for CLAAS, John Deere, KUHN, Gaspardo, Capello.
hero.desc: Series 1726 — agricultural bearings with extended inner ring tolerances, designed for seeders, headers and disc units in abrasive dust and moisture conditions.

block1.title: Why OEM manufacturers choose VELNOX agro bearings?
block1.card1_desc: Double contact seals on both sides. Protection against dust, dirt and moisture in field conditions.
block1.card2_desc: Direct replacement for CLAAS, JD, KUHN, Capello, Gaspardo, MF, NH bearings without design changes.
block1.card3_desc: Special design with extended inner ring bore — key feature of the 1726 series for agricultural applications.
